title: Google Explores Samsung Role In Next-Generation AI Chip As Demand Reshapes Global Semiconductor Supply Chain
description: Google is discussing plans with Samsung Electronics to manufacture part of its next-generation artificial intelligence chip, according to a new report.
content:
Google is discussing plans with Samsung Electronics to manufacture part of its next-generation artificial intelligence chip, according to a new report.

title: Do you live near a data center? Tell us what it’s like
description: By Clare Duffy, CNN New York (CNN) — New data center construction projects are springing up across the United States, as the tech industry seeks to meet huge computing demand to power artificial intelligence and the massive volume of content now stored online. title: Open-source AI may aid climate and development but deepen inequality, experts warn
description: Open-source artificial intelligence is advancing faster than the world can govern it, and the consequences could reshape the future of sustainability, democracy and global development. In a new comment published in Nature Communications, an international team of researchers warns that without coordinated action, open-source AI could also increase environmental pressures, deepen technological inequalities and facilitate the spread of misinformation.

title: Post-Naxalism Bastar Poised to Double Income of Inhabitant Tribals in 3 Years: Sai
description: The action plan proposes development of the dairy sector in a massive way, expansion of irrigation coverage to 32,000 hectares, development of tourism to a major industry and establishment of modern sectors such as Artificial Intelligence (AI) and semiconductors in Bastar region over the next three years.
content:
Raipur: Chhattisgarh chief minister Vishnu Deo Sai on Thursday unveiled a comprehensive action plan aimed at doubling the income of tribal families in Bastar in the state over the next three years.
